subcodes.first_line: O son of the noble one who hath ascended unto the Kingdom of his Glorious Lord! May God strengthen thee in all affairs and make thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن النبیل الذی عرج الی ملکوت ربه الجلیل ایدک الله فی جمیع الشئون و جعلک
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
